content.verdict: Cocoa Island is COMO's jewel-box retreat in South Malé Atoll — 33 overwater villas shaped like traditional dhoni boats strung along a single teak jetty. The scale is intimate, the wellness program is world-class, and the vibe is whispered luxury rather than look-at-me glamour.
content.best_room: The Dhoni Loft Suite for two floors of overwater living, or a COMO Villa if you want a private sun deck over the lagoon. Both deliver the iconic stepped-down ladder into the house reef.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival & Speedboat Transfer
itinerary_7_nights.description: 40-minute speedboat from Malé airport. Coconut welcome, villa tour, sunset wine on your overwater deck.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Shambhala Wellness Day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning yoga in the pavilion, COMO Shambhala massage for two, nutrient-rich lunch at Ufaa.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Snorkel the House Reef
itinerary_7_nights.description: Cocoa's reef is a 5m drop from your ladder — full morning exploring with turtles and reef sharks. Sunset dolphin cruise.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Private Sandbank Picnic
itinerary_7_nights.description: Boat drop-off at an empty sandbank with gourmet picnic, Champagne, and snorkel gear. Collected at sunset.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Dive & Relax
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning two-tank dive at nearby Kandooma Thila, afternoon reading in the overwater hammock, teppanyaki dinner on the beach.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Malé Day Trip or Pure Rest
itinerary_7_nights.description: Optional capital tour and fish market, or stay in for back-to-back spa rituals. In-villa degustation dinner by candlelight.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell morning
itinerary_7_nights.description: Sunrise yoga, final reef swim, speedboat back to Malé.

caveats: No private pools in the villas — main pool only
Small island with limited dining variety over long stays
Speedboat transfer can be rough in rainy season

faqs.question: Good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Excellent — small villa count, high privacy, Shambhala wellness, and every room is overwater.

faqs.question: Best time to visit?
faqs.answer: November to April for sunshine and calm water. Avoid May–August peak monsoon.

faqs.question: Book in advance?
faqs.answer: 4–6 months ahead; honeymoon suites go first.

faqs.question: Adults-only?
faqs.answer: No, but children under 8 are restricted and the resort stays peaceful.

faqs.question: Best room type?
faqs.answer: Dhoni Loft Suite for honeymooners — two storeys and extra space.

faqs.question: How to get there?
faqs.answer: 40-minute speedboat transfer from Velana International Airport (MLE) — no seaplane needed.
